ai_summary: Rajshree Polypack Limited (RPPL) has secured a significant domestic repeat order valued at approximately ₹ 3.09 Crores for the supply of Plastic Rigid Sheets, to be fulfilled by September 2026. This contract from a subsidiary of a major global confectionery company highlights RPPL's strong client relationships and will positively impact its short-term revenue. No red flags, such as related party transactions or promoter interests, were identified, indicating a straightforward business deal.
